name: Magical Corner Store - Goat's Mouth
description:
While hiking through the snow to your friend's house, you stumble upon a small store in an alleyway. What kind of magical adventures will you find yourself in at this out of the way and quirky place know as Goat's Mouth.

Not much to talk about with this one, ended up brainstorming in the shower and getting stuck with it, it wouldn't leave me alone until I wrote it out. it's an issue I have, try not to worry about it.

Also AI generated images are becoming a pain, I ended up having to edit this one to make it slightly presentable, kinda.
creator: TheGlitchyGhost
